metadata.description: Candidate-only ticker-to-CIK mapping reference for future SEC fetch/cache workflows. This file is not loaded by the app and must not be promoted directly into production graph data.
source_policy_notes: Use only reviewable public sources for ticker-to-CIK mappings, preferably official SEC company metadata, SEC submissions, or other durable official public sources.
Do not add guessed CIKs, inferred ticker mappings, placeholder source URLs, unsourced records, company candidates, relationship candidates, production nodes, or production edges.
Keep CIK mappings as reference-only lookup records until source validation, duplicate checks, manual review, and an explicit future production phase are complete.

candidate_schema_example.source_url: Official source URL beginning with https://
